data.title: Restore NYC launches report on 10 proven approaches to close mental health gap for human trafficking survivors, with 75% identifying trauma-informed care as top need. #EndHumanTrafficking.
data.description: During Human Trafficking Awareness Month, a recent report was published presenting actionable solutions, with a focus on the top needs of survivors. According to the report, an overwhelming 75% of human trafficking survivors prioritize trauma-informed care. The study, released in New York on January 9, 2026, highlights the critical importance of mental health support for survivors.

data.title: Autonomix presents PoC study data at 2026 ASCO GI Cancers Symposium, shows pain relief in pancreatic cancer stages 2-4.
data.description: A recent subgroup analysis revealed a consistent and clinically significant decrease in pain observed in patients at different disease stages. This reduction in pain was noted from Stage 2 all the way through Stage 4 of the disease. Notably, even late-stage patients, who typically have fewer treatment options available, experienced meaningful pain relief. Overall, the analysis underscores the positive impact of the treatment across various disease stages, providing hope for patients with advanced conditions.
PDS Biotech aligned with FDA on using PFS as primary endpoint.

data.title: Bitcoin signals positive uptrend as RSI turns bullish across timeframes, leading to $105K price target in coming weeks.
data.description: The Relative Strength Index (RSI) for Bitcoin has turned bullish across various timeframes, prompting a trader to set a price target of $105,000 for BTC within the next "three to four weeks."

data.title: PureWay and PPSWG partner to revolutionize pharmaceutical waste management in the US for safety and sustainability.
data.description: On January 9, 2026, PureWay and the Pharmaceutical Product Stewardship Work Group (PPSWG) revealed a new partnership in Houston. This collaboration aims to enhance pharmaceutical waste management by focusing on safety, compliance, and sustainability. The initiative is designed to bolster the nation's efforts in this area.

data.title: Paranovus Entertainment Technology Limited (NASDAQ: PAVS) regains Nasdaq bid price compliance on Jan 6, 2026.
data.description: On Jan. 9, 2026, Paranovus Entertainment Technology Limited (NASDAQ: PAVS) revealed that as of Jan. 6, 2026, it had been notified by the Nasdaq Office of General Counsel confirming the Company's compliance with the bid price requirement.

US Adds 50,000 Jobs in December, Misses Forecast The US added 50,000 jobs in December, below the 70,000 forecast, signaling further labour market cooling. The unemployment rate unexpectedly fell to 4.4%. November payrolls were revised down to 56,000. Two-year Treasury yields
Nick Timiraos on On an unrounded basis, the unemployment rate fell to 4.375% in December from a revised 4.536% in November.

data.title: Cathie Wood predicts Trump to buy Bitcoin before 2026 midterms for political and crypto support, citing Trump family investments.
data.description: Chief Executive Officer Cathie Wood of Ark Invest predicts that President Donald Trump will purchase Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) for the strategic reserve before the 2026 midterms to retain political momentum and support from crypto voters. Wood emphasized three main reasons influencing Trump's potential move: avoiding a 'lame duck' status during his final two years, safeguarding the value of his family's significant Bitcoin and crypto investments amid underperforming digital asset vehicles in 2025, and acknowledging the pivotal role the crypto community played in his 2024 election win. This move is seen as crucial for fulfilling promises made for the 2024 election victory. The full article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Cerro de Pasco Resources updates on Quiulacocha Tailings Project progress as they transition to next stage.
data.description: Cerro de Pasco Resources Inc. shared an update on their operations and corporate activities at the Quiulacocha Tailings Project. The company, also known as CDPR and trading under TSXV CDPR, OTCQB GPPRF, and FRA N8HP, informed about the completion of important workstreams as they move towards the project's next phase. This significant milestone showcases the progress made by the company in managing the project effectively.

data.title: Leica Store Boston hosts event on women's rights, collaborations with Yellow Rose Project and Concept Aware. Jan. 17.
data.description: In Teaneck, New Jersey, on January 9, 2026, Leica is hosting an event called Keeping Women's Rights in the Picture: A Live Discussion in collaboration with Yellow Rose Project and Concept Aware Podcast. This community-centered event will be held at the Leica Store & Gallery Boston on Saturday, January 17. The event aims to promote discussion and awareness surrounding women's rights.

data.title: InfoFi is transitioning from paying for posts to valuing credibility, splitting into content arbitrage & signal infrastructure. Content value decreases due to spam. Platforms like Kaito AI and Galxe drive user rewards. Web3 category divides into two models: content arbitrage & signal infrastructure. Spam increases as participation grows. Full story on Benzinga.com.
data.description: InfoFi launched last year with the goal of assigning a monetary value to information, rewarding users for their commentary and social engagement. The platform gained popularity but is now facing challenges as spam increases and yields decrease. In 2026, InfoFi is divided into two sectors: content arbitrage, focusing on engagement and rewards, and signal infrastructure, emphasizing credibility over volume. The shift is reshaping the market and opportunities. The initial platforms rewarded users with tokens or points for their activity, leading to rapid growth but also a decline in value due to an excess of content. The current trend is splitting into two distinct categories, content arbitrage, and signal infrastructure, with different strategies and economic models. You can read the full story on Benzinga.com.
